description_long: This object is a perfectly spherical form with a deep, dark purple coloration, featuring a subtle grid pattern overlay and scattered, glowing magenta and pink specks reminiscent of distant stars or nebulae. The surface appears smooth and seamless, with no visible mechanical or structural features such as blades, towers, or nacelles typically associated with windmills. The coloration transitions from nearly black to vibrant purple, with the grid and speckled highlights giving it a cosmic or digital appearance. There are no protrusions, openings, or interactive components visible from any angle. The object is entirely opaque, with no indication of transparency or internal structure. Its overall appearance is more abstract and decorative than functional, lacking any identifiable windmill components.
description: A smooth, dark purple sphere with a grid pattern and glowing magenta specks, resembling a cosmic or digital orb. No visible windmill features or mechanical parts are present.
description_view_0: A nearly black sphere with faint purple highlights and scattered magenta specks, minimal grid visibility.
description_view_1: The grid pattern and magenta highlights become more pronounced, with a brighter purple area visible.
description_view_2: The grid is most visible here, with a large, bright magenta area dominating the surface.
description_view_3: A mix of dark and bright purple regions, with the grid and specks distributed across the surface.
